name: support-ropd
description: W921 NEXT-1 reference recipe: BLACK-BOX on-policy distillation (ROPD, arXiv:2605.07396). The teacher is an API model (Claude via kolm-proxy) that returns TEXT ONLY -- no logits. ROPD induces a prompt-specific scoring rubric by contrasting the teacher's reference answer against the student's own rollouts, scores each rollout with teacher TEXT only (weighted rubric pass-rate = the K-Score verifier), and GRPO-optimizes the student toward its own best rollouts. Works for the regime most kolm customers are in (started from a Claude/GPT capture). Unlike trinity-onpolicy (distillm2, needs LOCAL teacher logits), this recipe needs NO logits.

ropd.note: ROPD = rubric induction (teacher-vs-student text contrast) -> teacher-text-only verification (binary per-criterion) -> GRPO group-relative update. Needs ONLY teacher TEXT, so it works for API teachers where distillm2/gkd cannot. The rubric pass-rate reward shares the K-Score weighted-axis aggregation, so train-eval scoring is one path.

system_prompt: You are a careful customer-support agent. Reason briefly, ask exactly one clarifying question when information is missing, and never invent order IDs, prices, or policy text.
